goal: Close the unfinished A1 branch from v2 to a final PROMOTE/REJECT verdict, and only if A1 fails open exactly one next low-friction candidate through the full acceptance chain.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable: never retune its hours, days, thresholds, or execution parameters
Any candidate must pass strict-additive, permissive-integration, ownership, and cannibalization proof before promotion
No medium-friction wave B until both low-friction branches (A1 + one of A2/A3) are fully closed with no promoted candidate
Only one active low-friction branch may be investigated at a time
Maximum 3-4 features per prototype; maximum 2-3 prototypes per branch
If a candidate loses positivity after removing its strongest historical segment, it is not mainline-quality

stages.title: Аудит артефактов v2 и фиксация инвариантов v3
stages.objective: Open a clean v3 research project, record a full v2 postmortem, and fix the invariant and hypothesis-tracking discipline before any new work.
actions: Create a new research_project for v3
Record an explicit v2 audit in research_record
Confirm single reference snapshot active-signal-v1@1
Define research_map axes: branch, data_layer, regime_type, acceptance_stage, final_decision
Establish branch lifecycle statuses: active, hold, rejected, promoted, watchlist
success_criteria: v3 project exists with no reference confusion
Hypothesis atlas defined in research_map
Branch closure discipline recorded as invariant

stages.title: Полный forensic-review ветки A1
stages.objective: Reconstruct the exact logic, signals, and trade anatomy of A1_high_iv_long_v1 from v2 artefacts before any new testing.
actions: Recover all A1 artefacts (snapshots, runs, features)
Document exact A1 entry/exit logic
Check for drift or mismatch between v2 claims and actual artefacts
Produce trade anatomy breakdown
Compute per-trade statistics
success_criteria: A1 logic is fully reproduced and documented
v2 claimed results are compared against v3 actual results
Signal orthogonality to base is assessed

stages.title: Stability и concentration для A1
stages.objective: Determine whether A1 survives as a genuine specialist layer across time windows and is not driven by a concentrated cluster of trades.
actions: Run window stability analysis on A1 across quarters, half-years, and rolling windows
Check stability stratified by hour, day-of-week, and cl_1h regime
Test resilience after removing the strongest historical segment
Run condition stability analysis
success_criteria: Honest verdict on whether A1 remains positive across the majority of windows
Concentration check completed: result is not driven by a handful of outlier trades

stages.title: Обязательная интеграция A1 в двух режимах
stages.objective: Close the main v2 gap by proving whether A1 is truly additive through both strict-additive and permissive integration against the unchanged base.
actions: Run strict additive integration (A1 signals layered on top of base without overlap)
Run permissive integration (A1 and base coexist with conflict resolution)
Compare both modes against the immutable base on PnL, trade count, profit factor, and drawdown
Assess whether weak quarters are repaired
success_criteria: Complete integration picture for A1 in both modes
Delta metrics against base computed for PnL, trades, PF, DD, and weak-quarter repair

stages.title: Ownership, cannibalization и proof of new entries для A1
stages.objective: Prove the nature of A1's delta to the base by measuring overlap, truly new trades, replaced base trades, and coverage expansion.
actions: Compute trade overlap between A1 and base
Count truly new trades vs. replaced base trades
Run layer_compare and signal_ownership analyses
Measure coverage expansion
Determine whether A1 genuinely extends the system or merely reshuffles base PnL
success_criteria: Ownership and cannibalization metrics are recorded
Enough evidence exists for a final PROMOTE / WATCHLIST / REJECT decision on A1

stages.title: Финальное решение по A1
stages.objective: Close A1 definitively with one of three verdicts: PROMOTE, WATCHLIST SPECIALIST, or REJECT.
actions: Aggregate all evidence from stages 2–5
Render final decision: PROMOTE / WATCHLIST / REJECT
Record decision and main reason in research_record
If PROMOTED: publish to model-backed feature or snapshot library
If WATCHLIST: document revisit conditions
If REJECTED: close the branch permanently
success_criteria: A1 is definitively closed with a recorded verdict and rationale

stages.title: Выбор ровно одной следующей low-friction ветки (если A1 не promoted)
stages.objective: If A1 was not promoted, select exactly one next low-friction branch (A2_iv_acceleration preferred, then A3_broader_cl_transition) and prepare its hypothesis and feature contracts.
actions: Evaluate remaining low-friction candidates from v2 base-absent surface
Prioritize A2_iv_acceleration; fall back to A3_broader_cl_transition only if A2 is unavailable
Prepare feature contract and hypothesis contract for the chosen branch
Do not touch wave B until this branch completes the full acceptance chain
success_criteria: Exactly one next branch is selected with documented rationale
Feature and hypothesis contracts are ready for clean testing
stages.gate_hint: A1 was not PROMOTED; a new branch is needed

stages.title: A2_iv_acceleration: прототип и standalone-тест
stages.objective: Test whether IV dynamics produce a viable specialist layer by building a compact feature set and running it through plausibility and standalone checks on the base-absent surface.
actions: Build compact feature set (max 3-4 features) capturing IV acceleration dynamics
Run causality check, warmup check, and materialization check
Evaluate features on base-absent surface
Build max 2-3 strict prototypes
Run standalone backtests on surviving prototypes
success_criteria: Either one mature A2 prototype survives plausibility and standalone tests, or an honest early rejection is recorded
stages.gate_hint: A2_iv_acceleration was selected as the next branch

stages.title: A3_broader_cl_transition: прототип и standalone-тест
stages.objective: Test whether a broader class of classifier transitions produces a viable specialist layer through transition features and base-absent surface evaluation.
actions: Build transition features from broader classifier set
Group transitions by semantic meaning
Evaluate on base-absent surface
Build max 2 strict prototypes
Run standalone backtests on surviving prototypes
success_criteria: Either one mature A3 prototype survives plausibility and standalone tests, or an honest early rejection is recorded
stages.gate_hint: A3_broader_cl_transition was selected as the next branch

stages.title: Контроль запрета на medium-friction wave B
stages.objective: Enforce the hard gate: wave B (cross-symbol, model-backed routing, hybrids) is forbidden until both low-friction branches are fully closed without a promoted candidate.
actions: Verify A1 is definitively closed
Verify the selected next branch (A2 or A3) is definitively closed
Confirm wave B has NOT been opened prematurely
Record gate status in research_record
success_criteria: All three gate conditions are verified and recorded: A1 closed, A2/A3 closed, wave B not opened

stages.title: Финальный отчёт агента
stages.objective: Produce the mandatory structured final report covering v2 gaps, A1 closure verdict, next-branch results, overall v3 outcome, and concrete v4 recommendations.
actions: Document what was unfinished in v2
Document how A1 was closed and whether it was a genuine additive layer
Document which next branch was chosen and why
Document what that branch showed
State the main v3 outcome
Provide concrete v4 recommendations
success_criteria: Final report follows the mandatory 7-section structure
All branch decisions are recorded with rationale
v4 recommendations are concrete and actionable

warnings: Plan v2 was only partially executed — the full acceptance chain (stability, integration, ownership, walk-forward) was never completed
Only one substantive v2 artefact survives: A1_high_iv_long_v1
